name: typing-test-sapien

metadata.name: typing-test-sapien
metadata.summary: A CLI-based typing speed test application

documentation:
# Typing Test CLI

A command-line typing speed test application written in Python.

## Features
- Practice typing with predefined sentences.
- Measure your typing speed (WPM) and accuracy.
- Supports blind mode and custom configurations.

## Installation
```bash
pip install typing-test
```

## Usage
```bash
typing-test --config /path/to/config.json --sentences /path/to/sentences.txt
```

functions.name: typing_test.utils.calculate_accuracy
documentation: Calculate typing accuracy as a percentage.

functions.name: typing_test.utils.colorize_typed
documentation: Colorize the typed words based on correctness.

functions.name: typing_test.utils.display_session_bar_chart
documentation: Display a bar chart showing all test results in the session.

functions.name: typing_test.typing_test.load_config
documentation: Load configuration from the config.json file.

functions.name: typing_test.typing_test.load_sentences
documentation: Load sentences from a text file.
